Thanks for contributing! Please keep this PR a focused patch — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
Fill in the section below and tick the boxes that apply.

## What does this change?

<!-- A sentence or two: what changed and why. Link any related issue, e.g. "Fixes #123". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR does **one thing** — unrelated changes are split into separate PRs.
- [ ] The diff is a **focused patch**: only the lines that needed to change, no wholesale file rewrites.
- [ ] **No drive-by reformatting** of untouched code.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any behaviour change.
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests` passes locally; CI is green.
- [ ] Scripts stay **stdlib-only** — no new pip dependencies.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or personal usage data in the diff.
